title: Mighty Steeds
description: Horses are under-appreciated by Mojang, lets give them some love!
body:
## Mighty Steeds!
**Don't you just hate how weak horses are in vanilla? Here is your solution!**


# Enchantments

## Reach
Effects: +2 Entity Attack Range
![Reach Enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ccc8d8dceec88705f8334ba2fcc2b4efb258de9.png)

Max Level: 1

Applies to: Tridents

## Jousting
Effects: +4 Attack Damage per level while riding a horse.
![Jousting Enchantment compared to Sharpness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae409d482a5f1dbbcaa37f13a3c86b1806b08bab.png)
> Image is inaccurate by 2 damage (21), I was just too lazy to re-do it :sob:
> 
Max Level: 3

Applies to: Tridents

## Ice Strider
Effects: Turns a large radius of water into ice when walking nearby.
![Ice Strider Enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad5f1a9a152d375bacb2e21a3660b66dcff96fc7.png)

Max Level: 2

Applies to: Diamond Horse Armor
(Treasure Enchantment)

# New Mechanics

## Goat Horn Charge
When right clicking a goat horn, your horse will dash forward, granting both of you useful buffs!
![Charge Ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9424a3b0319c9f8dc4d63b24cfe214eab5dc0167.png)

## Buffs
All horses now have an additional 10 hearts.

All horses now move 10% faster in water.

Horses will no longer sink when in water.

Mining while on a horse is now closer to normal mining speed.
![Horse Swimming Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbecec6fa5587ff301f6a339a9a8506e172c8f3c.png)

## Recipe Changes!
Saddles, name tags, leads, Tridents, and all horse armor can now be crafted!

![Name Tag Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184692339a62f67f467a168bf1f59a8c5128f505.png)
![Iron Horse Armor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c6502519b0523766721a487e952bd602db85319.png)
![Diamond Horse Armor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b19f64db82e9f3d98efeaee9830a54f2bcc5dcd0.png)
![Saddle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50ed0af08e50079c436854b54a13e724d00ae48b.png)
![Golden Horse Armor Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e63385bfa6596a36c6738f0897c2f41d3e0bd99.png)
![Trident Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7568674528d4f96df53cb650df1d72620d79cd7.png)

# Recommendations
I recommend pairing this datapack with similar mods, such as [Horseman!](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseman)

# Warnings for Server Owners
PLEASE make sure that you do /reload after adding this pack, or else things may break! (Yes, even if you added the pack and then restarted the server, for some reason it is weird like that)

This pack is balanced around players being in max enchanted gear, but if that is not the case then I recommend editing the damage values provided from "Jousting", as it's damage is balanced around Sharpness V Netherite!

# Planned features:
Port all new buffs to Mules, Donkeys, and Skeleton horses.

</details>

## Message "avaasusual." on Discord to report any issues please!
